page.title: Project:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json

revision.comment: SD0001 changed the content model of the page [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AFC topic map.json]] from "wikitext" to "JSON"

Primefac moved page [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AFC topic map.json]] to [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]] without leaving a redirect: standardize name

Protected "[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]": AFC has a penchant for drawing in new users that find our hidden pages, SPER to avoid that ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2501 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 11 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Wikipedia:WikiProject_Articles_for_creation/AfC_topic_map.json]]
